case_title: MCGUIRE, JOYCE VS BITTERMAN, LORI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $634.00 FILED BY MCGUIRE, JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT BITTERMAN, LORI PURELY PHYSICAL FITNESS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGUIRE, JOYCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BITTERMAN, LORI PURELY PHYSICAL FITNESS, INC $634.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $684.00, LORI BITTERMAN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PURELY PHYSICAL IS AMENDED TO PURELY PHYSICAL FITNESS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
